name: Bushwack
description: A triple-barrel Jakobs shotgun built for brutal point-blank bursts. Each shot throws out a heavy pellet load for excellent damage per trigger pull, but the spread is very wide and falls apart quickly at range. Its loading style helps it get back into action fast, which keeps it deadly up close and unreliable at a distance.
notes: It only spawns at green rarity or higher and can drop as a regular world item from suitable loot sources.
